pr.title: Record: Parallel Muon + Parameter Banking — 81.87ms/step, val_bpb 1.1247 (3-seed mean)

output.summary: Parameter Banking groups weights into banks and combines with Parallel Muon scheduling to batch Newton-Schulz optimizer ops instead of DDP per layer.
techniques: Banked `nn.Parameter` tensors replace 66 `nn.Linear` weights for batched optimizer math
Parallel Muon reduce-scatter/Adam/all-gather schedule overlaps comm with small-parameter updates
Local batched Newton-Schulz on each GPU shard avoids DDP gradient aggregation bottlenecks
